name: Perona
description:
__Height:__ 160 cm (5'3")
__Affiliations:__ Thriller Bark Pirates (Mysterious Four)
__Devil Fruit:__ Horo Horo no Mi (Hollow-Hollow Fruit)
__Devil Fruit Type:__ Paramecia

Nicknamed the "Ghost Princess", Perona is a girl dressed in Gothic Lolita style and a commander in the army of Gecko Moria on his island-ship of Thriller Bark. She is also the commander of Perona Wonder Garden, where an army of animal zombies live and protect her. She looted the Thousand Sunny with some zombies and later took on guard duty while Absalom was away attempting to marry Nami. She cannot stand anything that she feels is not cute, such as insects.  Perona has eaten the Horo Horo no mi (Ghost Ghost fruit) which allows her to create several ghostly apparitions. The ghosts can pass through someone to cause them to go into a sort of induced depression.
